object_a.label: couch
object_a.description: long dark leather sofa along left-center wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: A dark brown/black leather three-seat sofa placed along the left side of the living area extending toward the center. Cushions and slight sheen indicate leather material; there is a light colored throw or paper draped on one arm. Sofa sits on the carpeted floor facing right toward the fireplace/TV area.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Parallel to the staircase and left of the main walking aisle; faces the fireplace and TV on the right wall

object_b.label: plant
object_b.description: potted green houseplant on small table near front of sofa
object_b.long_form_open_description: A medium-sized leafy green houseplant (possibly a dracaena or similar) in a pot placed on a small dark table beside the sofa's front corner. Leaves are long and hanging; pot is dark and the plant appears healthy.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on a small side table adjacent to the front left corner of the sofa, near the base of the staircase
